# Button Controls

> Clickable buttons and button groups

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

Clickable buttons and button groups

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Button Creation** — when Text and icon buttons is requested, then Text and icon buttons completed.
- **Button Signals** — when pressed, released, toggled is requested, then pressed, released, toggled completed.
- **Button Groups** — when Radio button behavior is requested, then Radio button behavior completed.
- **Styling** — when Customize appearance is requested, then Customize appearance completed.
